title: coleus madagascariensis
intro: Coleus madagascariensis, also known as the African Coleus or Coleus aromaticus, is a plant species in the Lamiaceae family, native to Madagascar and other tropical regions. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its various medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties, which can be used to treat fever, cough, and digestive issues. The health benefits of Coleus madagascariensis include reducing inflammation, improving respiratory health, and supporting the immune system. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, and is often used in traditional remedies, such as treating sore throats and colds.
